description: Validates that findings carry correct confidence tiers under varying unresolved pressure

expectations.subject: src/clearly-dead.ts
expectations.note: Zero incoming edges -- flagged regardless of pressure

expectations.subject: src/maybe-dead.ts
expectations.note: No direct imports; confidence may be downgraded under unresolved pressure

expectations.subject: src/used.ts
expectations.note: Directly imported by index.ts -- never flagged
Confidence counts object must be present with high/medium/low tiers
Every finding must carry a confidence field with a valid tier
